title: araujia albens
intro: Araujia albens, also known as Devil's Claw, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids, particularly harpagoside. The health benefits of Araujia albens include relief from arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as improved digestion and reduced stress. In herbal preparations, the roots and tubers of the plant are often dried and made into capsules, tablets, or teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
